# Information
- **OS:** [Arch Linux](https://archlinux.org/)
- **Shell:** bash
 - **Prompt:** [starship](https://github.com/starship/starship)
- **WM:** [i3-gaps](https://github.com/Airblader/i3)
- **Terminal emulator:** [alacritty](https://github.com/alacritty/alacritty)
- **Bar:** [polybar](https://github.com/polybar/polybar)
- **Font:** [Iosevka](https://github.com/be5invis/Iosevka)
- **Compositor:** [picom](https://github.com/yshui/picom)
- **App launcher:** [jgmenu](https://github.com/johanmalm/jgmenu)
- **Text editor:** [neovim](https://github.com/neovim/neovim)
 - **IDE layer:** [LunarVIM](https://github.com/LunarVim/LunarVIM)
- **Browser:** Firefox
- **Image viewer:** [geeqie](https://github.com/BestImageViewer/geeqie)
- **Document viewer:** [zathura](https://github.com/pwmt/zathura)
- **Screenshot software:** [Flameshot](https://github.com/flameshot-org/flameshot)
